ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Milk chocolate 68% (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, skimmed milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier (soya lecithin), bourbon vanilla. Cocoa dry solids min. 33%), liquorice 32% (wheat flour (gluten), sugar, glucose syrup, invert sugar, liquorice extract, flavours, fully hydrogenated coconut fat, table salt, colour (E153), stabiliser (E471), coconut oil). May contain traces of tree nuts.
